description: Create a 3D-printable nameplate in FreeCAD consisting of a 100mm x 30mm x 3mm rectangular base plate on the XY plane. Add 3D text reading "ROBOT-01" centered on the top face of the base plate using the font file /usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf with a text height of 12mm. Extrude the text 2mm above the base. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/nameplate.FCStd and export the final geometry as an STL mesh to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/nameplate.stl.
